programme.title: The Skeleton's Compass
programme.desc: A group of middle school friends go on the hunt for treasure after finding a skeleton in the woods.

programme.title: Ainbo: Spirit of the Amazon
programme.desc: Moana meets Brave with the hit new animation Ainbo: Spirit of the Amazon. The story of a young girl who was born and grew up in the deepest jungle of the Amazon.

programme.title: A Unicorn Adventure
programme.desc: If your father is a legendary explorer and adventurer who charts the lost corners of the world, what do you do when he goes missing? If you're Mo and Melody, the children of Charles Willard, you literally follow in his footsteps and try to track him down.

programme.title: Lez Bomb
programme.desc: Lez Bomb is a hilarious and sweet “coming out” comedy in the vein of Meet the Parents from Bobby Farrelly, producer of There's Something about Mary. Lauren, (Writer-Director Jenna Laurenzo) comes home with life changing news. As it turns out, there is no good time to drop the Lez Bomb.

programme.title: Love Sarah
programme.desc: Three generations of women, led by Mimi will need to overcome grief, doubts and differences to honour the memory of their beloved Sarah, while embarking on a journey to establish a new bakery in Notting Hill, a place filled with love, hope and colourful pastries from all over the world.

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Everything is running smoothly for popular radio DJ Dr. Emma Lloyd in the run up to her own wedding when she makes the shocking discovery: she's already married – and to someone else!

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature.

programme.title: A Dangerous Man
programme.desc: A newly released prisoner becomes embroiled in a street war between the police and Chinese drug dealers. Starring Steven Seagal (2009).

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: A mercenary is hired by an drug lord to break his son out of a maximum security prison. Starring Steven Seagal (2006).

programme.title: The Keeper
programme.desc: A policeman turned bodyguard has to save a billionaire's daughter that he was hired to protect. Starring Steven Seagal (2009).

programme.title: CONTRACT TO KILL
programme.desc: A CIA agent has to stop Islamic terrorists from teaming up with Mexican cartels to smuggle weapons of mass destruction into the U.S.

programme.title: Killing Salazar
programme.desc: Six U.S. agents have to protect a key witness in a major drug case from being murdered by the drug dealers he is going to testify against. Starring Luke Goss and Steven Seagal (2016).

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: Boot up for suspense and high-powered excitement with Jonny Lee Miller and Angelina Jolie when a group of hackers, the rebels of the information age, find themselves embroiled in a plot that could destroy the world's ecosystems…or their own lives.

programme.title: Robot Overlords
programme.desc: The adults lost the war and now the kids must save the world! Robots rule the streets and the people are locked in their homes. Stepping outside risks being vaporised by a hulking Sentry or picked off by a lethal Sniper.

programme.title: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: An uptight and by-the-book cop (Reese Witherspoon) tries to protect the sexy and outgoing widow (Sofia Vergara) of a drug boss as they race through Texas pursued by crooked cops and murderous gunmen.

programme.title: A Hologram for the King
programme.desc: A Hologram for the King follows businessman Alan Clay (Tom Hanks) on a journey halfway around the world, far from his American roots, to a rising Saudi Arabian city.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines 1
programme.desc: The first in a Double Bill: Safari hunter, Allan Quartermain, heads into Africa in order to rescue a man, who had disappeared while searching for the fabled lost gold mines of King Solomon.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines 1
programme.desc: The first in a Double Bill: Safari hunter, Allan Quartermain, heads into Africa in order to rescue a man, who had disappeared while searching for the fabled lost gold mines of King Solomon.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of a Double Bill: Legends of countless riches lie ahead as Quartermain and his crew of explorers encounter thrilling twists and turns deep down in King Solomon's mines.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of a Double Bill: Legends of countless riches lie ahead as Quartermain and his crew of explorers encounter thrilling twists and turns deep down in King Solomon's mines.

programme.title: June Again
programme.desc: During a fleeting bout of lucidity from her dementia, June Wilton has precious little time to bring together her estranged children, save the family business, and rekindle an old flame.

programme.title: June Again
programme.desc: During a fleeting bout of lucidity from her dementia, June Wilton has precious little time to bring together her estranged children, save the family business, and rekindle an old flame.

programme.title: Swarmed
programme.desc: The residents of a small town find themselves battling a swarm of hornets which has been sprayed by a super pesticide.

programme.title: Swarmed
programme.desc: The residents of a small town find themselves battling a swarm of hornets which has been sprayed by a super pesticide.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace becomes a princess when a summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: The Man Without A Face
programme.desc: Chuck wants to leave home but can't make the grade for boarding school. Then, he finds out the disfigured recluse (Mel Gibson, "Braveheart") living nearby is an ex-teacher.

programme.title: George And The Dragon
programme.desc: A knight (James Purefoy, "Rome") returning from the Crusades takes on a dragon after the disappearance of the kindly Princess Lunna (Piper Perabo, "Coyote Ugly"). With Patrick Swayze.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Nine criminals are placed on an island. Only the last person alive in 30 hours leaves the island.

programme.title: Bad Lieutenant: Port of Call New Orleans
programme.desc: A detective addicted to pain meds investigates the murder of a drug-involved family.

programme.title: Septembers of Shiraz
programme.desc: A Jewish family in Iran find their lives turned upside down with the onslaught of revolution.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attach for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: The World's Fastest Indian
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins stars as Burt Munro, a man who never let the dreams of youth fade. After a lifetime of perfecting his classic Indian motorcycle, Burt set off from the bottom of the world to test his bike at the Bonneville Salt Flats in Utah. With all the odds against him, he set a new speed record and captured the spirit of his times. Burt Munro's 1967 world record remains unbroken and his legend lives on today.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: Barbara Thorson (Madison Wolfe) is a teenage girl who escapes the realities of school and a troubled family life by retreating into her magical world of fighting evil giants. With the help of her new friend Sophia (Sydney Wade) and her school counsellor (Zoe Saldana), Barbara learns to face her fears and battle the giants that threaten her world.

programme.title: Dragon Blade
programme.desc: Inspired by true historical events, this epic action thriller stars martial arts legend Jackie Chan, John Cusack and Adrian Brody. When corrupt Roman leader Tiberius arrives with a giant army to claim the Silk Road, Huo An (Chan), teams up his army with an mysterious elite Legion, led by General Lucius (Cusack), to protect his country. A tale of courage, friendship and honour.

programme.title: Time After Time
programme.desc: About Time meets The Time Travellers Wife in this coming-of-age sci-fi romance. If you could turn back time, could you win back the love of your life? When physics genius Stillman (Asa Butterfield) is dumped by his girlfriend Debbie (Sophie Turner), he creates a time machine and with his wing-man Evan (Skyler Gisondo) sets off to right every wrong. But some mistakes are too perfect to fix.

programme.title: The Operative
programme.desc: Munich meets Homeland in this pacy psychological thriller, based on the hit novel The English Teacher by Yiftach R. Atir. Rachel (Diane Kruger, Inglourious Basterds), a rogue spy from Israel's feared national intelligence force vanishes. Following a cryptic phone call, her former handler Thomas (Martin Freeman, The Hobbit Trilogy) must retrace her steps to uncover the threats that lie ahead.

programme.title: Rubikon
programme.desc: All they can do is watch as the world burns. The emergence of an extinction event on Earth leaves the inhabitants of a space station in horror, as they witness the end of humanity unfold before their very eyes. Does the crew risk their lives to get back home during the global catastrophe and search for survivors or remain safe and watch as life as they know it comes to an end?

programme.title: Love On A Limb
programme.desc: Aimee is always up for a good cause, so when the town's beloved Oak tree is set to be felled, she takes it upon herself to try and save it. But will her actions ultimately lead to love? (2016)

programme.title: Cupids on Beacon Street
programme.desc: A romance book editor shares a house with a self-help coach who needs the space to host romantically themed workshops for Valentine's Day. Starring Britt Irvin (2021)

programme.title: South Beach Love
programme.desc: (2021) Rom-com with William Levy and Taylor Cole. Cuban cooks and ex partners go head to head at rival parties. Will old flames reignite or will it be a recipe for disaster?

programme.title: Love Strikes Twice
programme.desc: A woman is hit by a car while on her way to drop off divorce papers. When she wakes up without any memory, her husband is determined to recapture her heart. Stars Katrina Begin, Tilky Jones (2017)

programme.title: Love at Sunset Terrace
programme.desc: Sophie goes on vacation to recharge and detox from her city life. Michael is a single dad and owner of her rental. Will his life be tempting enough to leave her city life behind (2020)

programme.title: Forever In My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs—back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: The Rewrite
programme.desc: Once upon a time, screenwriter Keith Michaels was on top of the world. But now, he's divorced, broke and hasn't written a hit film in years. His attitude slowly begins to turn when he meets Holly, a single mum.

programme.title: The Beauty Of Love
programme.desc: Emma has a lifestyle website that she puts her heart and soul into called “Classically Emma”. But when her numbers start trending down, she thinks she might've found her fix in a partnership with an ambitious millennial named Jill who has her own dreams.

programme.title: A Snapshot of Forever
programme.desc: After leaving her big city life behind, wedding photographer Jessie Brookes is happier than ever. When famous actor Nate Brown shows up on her parent's vineyard for his sister's wedding, she quickly realizes that there is more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Listen Out for Love
programme.desc: Peyton Pepper, a goal-driven podcast producer, is forced to mold Alex McKinney, a brash loose cannon, into her next star and create the perfect show to save both of their careers. That show comes in the form of finding Peyton's iconic idol, true love.

programme.title: Life With Music
programme.desc: In this life affirming story of hope, struggling pianist finds inspiration with a free-spirited music critic.

programme.title: You May Not Kiss the Bride
programme.desc: Bryan is a quiet, photographer but when he falls foul of local gangsters, he is forced to marry the boss's daughter, Masha, in order for her to get her green card. They are sent to a remote tropical island for a honeymoon that is far from idyllic.

programme.title: Couples Vacation
programme.desc: When Jack and Amanda head off on a glamping trip to "reignite their spark", their blissful romantic getaway is rudely hijacked and they are left in more trouble than before!

programme.title: The Loss Adjuster
programme.desc: Hapless Insurance Loss Adjuster - Martin Dyer - feels his life is spiralling out of control but discovers that even when you reach rock bottom, that some clouds really do have a silver lining.

programme.title: For The Love Of Grace
programme.desc: After Grace Harding is saved from a fire by Steve Lockwood, a widowed firefighter, they teach each other to embrace life as they fall in love.

programme.title: Identical Love
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Dr. Charlotte Hudson needs to escape life at home. She signs up to volunteer at a health clinic in a tropical country. But her plans of escaping are thrown off when she comes across her former fiancé's twin brother, Seth (a dentist), who is also volunteering with the clinic. As they spend time together, Seth falls in love with Charlotte, but she struggles to let go of seeing her fiancé every time she looks at Seth. The island romance will help her break free from the past and love Seth for who he is.

programme.title: Love In Aruba
programme.desc: A lonely teacher (Amber) is hired by Connor, the single father of a struggling student. She is to tutor his daughter Macey (age 10) over a summer while they travel for his work. As Amber helps Macey, she sees glimpses of what's missing in the family's life. Their grand destinations are filled with rich items and potential rewarding business deals, but it's missing heart. Amber's influence fills the void and brings Macey and Connor together. With it, Amber starts to fall in love with Connor, but can he see her as anything beyond the hired help?

programme.title: The Shunning
programme.desc: All her life Katie Lapp has longed for the forbidden things, but will her dreams come at a price too dear to pay? Why would Katie's mother, a plain and simple Amish-woman who embraces the old ways, hide a beautiful satin baby dress in the attic? The staggering answers come on the eve of Katie's wedding to widower, Bishop John Beiler, with the arrival of a beautiful “Englisher” woman who has been searching for her, throwing Katie's life – present and future – into confusion.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Romance
programme.desc: Actress Emma Hutton is determined to help find her friend Hope a perfect match but in doing so, she accidentally tramples on several hearts. When Emma realizes she herself has always loved her good friend Gray, Emma learns love works best when she doesn't meddle with it. A charming romance inspired by Jane Austen's "Emma."

programme.title: Quest For Love
programme.desc: Mackenzie travels to Costa Rica for work. Her best friend Ethan comes along to get romantic inspiration for his action /adventure novel. Mackenzie has loved Ethan for a long time, but he only sees her as a friend--until a tourist named Lucas makes Ethan see Mackenzie in a new light.

programme.title: Death Saved My Life
programme.desc: Jade (Meagan Good) appears perfect but her life is far from idyllic behind doors.

programme.title: Into the Arms of Danger
programme.desc: A combative phone call with her mom, Laura, results in 17-year-old Jenny.

programme.title: Husbands Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Barbra found Prince Charming in Michael, until accusations arose over his new job.

programme.title: Flowers in the Attic
programme.desc: V. C. Andrews' cult classic Lifetime Movie siblings hide post father's death.

programme.title: Death Saved My Life
programme.desc: Jade (Meagan Good) appears perfect but her life is far from idyllic behind doors.

programme.title: Aberrant
programme.desc: Cole (Jack Quaid) stirs everyone up during his best friend's wedding as something seems off between him and the bride.

programme.title: All of My heart 2
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are preparing for the big opening of their bed and breakfast, Emily's Country Inn, when a huge storm hits Bucks County. Brian agrees to return to Wall Street to boost their funds, while Jenny scrambles to keep the opening on time.

programme.title: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: Laura Paddington is overcome with joy when her daughter, Zoe, returns to her after being abducted 17 years before--but is Zoe really her long lost child?

programme.title: Amber's Story
programme.desc: This is the true story of the kidnapping of Amber Hagerman and how her family came together to help other abducted children as a result of her tragedy which resulted in a new system to help find missing children - The Amber Alert.

programme.title: Envy (2004)
programme.desc: Tim and Nick are best friends, neighbors, and co-workers, whose equal footing is suddenly tripped up when one of Nick's harebrained get-rich-quick schemes actually succeeds. Vapoizer, a spray that literally makes dog poop evaporate into thin air, to where exactly is anyone's guess. Tim, who had scoffed at Nick's idea and passed on an opportunity to get in on the deal, can only watch as Nick's fortune, and Tim's own envy, grow to equally outrageous proportions. When the flames of jealousy are fanned by an oddball drifter who imposes himself into the situation, Tim's life careens wildly out of control, taking Nick's with it.

programme.title: Year One
programme.desc: When a couple of lazy hunter-gatherers (Black and Cera) are banished from their primitive village, they set off on an epic journey through the ancient world.

programme.title: The Man From Toronto
programme.desc: The world's deadliest assassin and New York's biggest screw-up are mistaken for each other.

programme.title: The Interview
programme.desc: Story revolves around a handsome talk show host and his producer who find themselves in way over their heads when they get involved in a plot to assassinate the prime minister of North Korea.

programme.title: Django Meets Sartana
programme.desc: The small desert town of Black City is held in a reign of terror by a nasty gang of criminals lead by the ruthless Bud Willer.

programme.title: Sitting Bull
programme.desc: A cavalry officer sympathetic to the wronged Sioux fixes a meeting between Chief Sitting Bull and President Grant but a dishonest Indian Agent and a hateful General Custer test the Sioux's patience, threatening to derail the peace-talks.

programme.title: Man, Pride & Vengeance
programme.desc: A stalwart Spanish soldier turns to a life of crime to prove his love for a mysterious and promiscuous gypsy woman.

programme.title: Wild Faith
programme.desc: A Civil War vet tries to make peace with his losses and start a new life despite the world resisting change around him.

programme.title: Home at Seven
programme.desc: When bank clerk David Preston returns home at seven, his wife tells him that he did not come home at seven, or at any other time, the previous evening. To his amazement, he has no idea where he could have been. There is a complete gap in his memory between the time he left the bank on Monday until his arrival home that following evening. The family doctor is inclined at first to treat it lightly, but during Preston's 24-hour loss of memory, a murder has been committed.

programme.title: Clockwise
programme.desc: Brian Stimpson, headmaster, runs his school, as he runs his life, by the clock - until one little slip destroyed his schedule and turned one of the most important days of his life into a disaster.

programme.title: THE ARSENAL STADIUM MYSTERY
programme.desc: Classic crime drama. During a charity match between Arsenal and the Trojans, the Trojans' striker mysteriously collapses in full view of the capacity crowd. When it is discovered that he has been poisoned, Scotland Yard is called in to investigate.

programme.title: Spanish Gardener, The
programme.desc: Separated from his wife and embittered by lack of promotion, Harrington Brande is posted to a small port in Spain

programme.title: THE SECRET PLACE
programme.desc: When a temperamental opera star finds out her husband is accused of murder she sets off to find the real killer and is determined to prove her husbands innocence. As she comes closer to the truth, she also comes closer to danger.

programme.title: Proximity
programme.desc: Close Encounters of the Third Kind' meets 'Independence Day'. Earth is in danger and a loner named Isaac holds the key to unravelling the mystery that will expose the truth behind alien abduction.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: Skyman
programme.desc: The story of Carl who believes he experienced an alien encounter at 10-years-old and is now trying to reconnect with the UFO as the same location.

programme.title: Space Warriors
programme.desc: Desperate to follow in the footsteps of his absent astronaut father, 13-year-old Jimmy's dreams come true when he wins one of five opportunities to compete for a scholarship to Space Camp.

programme.title: Lost Letter Mysteries
programme.desc: The Postables are tasked with finding a letter containing a valuable lottery ticket. Starring Eric Mabius (2016)

programme.title: Lost Letter Mysteries
programme.desc: A bucket list is discovered in a prop mailbox leading the postal detectives to start a search for its intended recipient. Starring Eric Mabius (2016)

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: After a priceless crown is stolen, Aurora must investigate who would kill to get their hands on it. (2020)

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.sub-title: Reunited and it Feels So Deadly
programme.desc: Aurora must interrogate all the suspects after someone is murdered during her high school reunion. (2021)

programme.title: The Gourmet Detective: Eat, Drink and Be Buried
programme.desc: When a culinary whiz is hired to oversee the kitchen at an annual summer gala, he soon finds himself caught up in another murder mystery. Stars Dylan Neal, Brooke Burns (2019)

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: With a story ripped from today's headlines, THE NET is a compelling, high-tech drama about a computer systems analyst (Sandra Bullock) who becomes caught in a web of intrigue and conspiracy when she accidentally taps into a classified program.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Don't Breathe
programme.desc: A trio of friends break into the house of a wealthy blind man, thinking they 'll get away with the perfect heist. They 're wrong.

programme.title: The Girl In The Spider's Web
programme.desc: Young computer hacker Lisbeth Salander and journalist Mikael Blomkvist find themselves caught in a web of spies, cybercriminals and corrupt government officials.

programme.title: Risen
programme.desc: RISEN is the epic Biblical story of the Resurrection, as told through the eyes of a non-believer. Clavius, a powerful Roman military tribune, and his aide, Lucius, are tasked with solving the mystery of what happened to Jesus in the weeks following the crucifixion.

programme.title: The Ark
programme.desc: The Ark is a retelling of the biblical story of Noah and The Ark. Noah, a farmer and family man, is instructed by an angel to build an ark in the middle of a desert in order to save both his family and the faithful from a devastating flood.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: To The Wonder
programme.desc: After falling in love in Paris, Marina and Neil come to Oklahoma, where problems arise. Their church's Spanish-born pastor struggles with his faith, while Neil encounters a woman from his childhood.

programme.title: The Fountain
programme.desc: Two immortally linked souls transcend the boundaries of time and space, one desperately searching for the answers that will save the other, and deliver the promise of eternal life.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Vantage Point
programme.desc: The attempted assassination of the president is told from five different perspectives.

programme.title: Born to Race
programme.desc: Born To Race is the story of Danny Krueger, a rebellious young street racer on a collision course with trouble. After an accident at an illegal street race, he is sent to a small town to live with his estranged father, a washed up NASCAR racer.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: A group of competitors participates in a wild, illegal car race across America, where the drivers use every dirty trick in the book to win.
